words.laoTranslation: ລົງມືປະຕິບັດ
words.thaiTranslation: ลงมือทำ, ดำเนินการ
words.definition: Do something to achieve an aim or deal with a situation.
words.exampleSentence: The government must take action to stop inflation.

words.laoTranslation: ເສຍໃຈຢ່າງສຸດຊຶ້ງ
words.thaiTranslation: เสียใจอย่างสุดซึ้ง
words.definition: To feel extremely sorry or remorseful about something.
words.exampleSentence: I deeply regret my choice of words last night.

words.laoTranslation: ຕັດສິນໃຈ
words.thaiTranslation: ตัดสินใจ
words.definition: To choose something after thinking about the possibilities.
words.exampleSentence: You need to make a decision before Friday.

words.laoTranslation: ຮັບຮູ້ຢ່າງເຕັມສ່ວນ
words.thaiTranslation: ตระหนักรู้อย่างเต็มที่
words.definition: Having complete knowledge or understanding of a situation.
words.exampleSentence: I am fully aware of the consequences of my choice.

words.laoTranslation: ຕອບສະໜອງຕາມຄວາມຕ້ອງການ
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นไปตามข้อกำหนด
words.definition: To fulfill the rules, standards, or conditions necessary.
words.exampleSentence: Applicants must meet the requirements listed in the description.

words.laoTranslation: ເອົາໃຈໃສ່, ຕັ້ງໃຈ
words.thaiTranslation: ตั้งใจ, ใส่ใจ
words.definition: Listen, watch, or consider something carefully.
words.exampleSentence: Please pay attention to the teacher.

words.laoTranslation: ປັບປຸງດີຂຶ້ນຢ່າງມາກມາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: ปรับปรุงดีขึ้นอย่างมาก
words.definition: Changed to be much better than before.
words.exampleSentence: The new system is vastly improved compared to last year.

words.laoTranslation: ໄດ້ຮັບປະສົບການ
words.thaiTranslation: ได้รับประสบการณ์
words.definition: To get knowledge or skill from doing something.
words.exampleSentence: This internship is a great way to gain experience.

words.laoTranslation: ແນະນຳຢ່າງເດັດຂາດ
words.thaiTranslation: แนะนำอย่างแข็งขัน/เด็ดขาด
words.definition: To offer recommendations with high emphasis.
words.exampleSentence: I strongly advise you to double-check the contract.

words.laoTranslation: ເຜີຊີນໜ້າກັບຄວາມທ້າທາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: เผชิญหน้ากับความท้าทาย
words.definition: To deal with a difficult situation or obstacle.
words.exampleSentence: Small businesses face a challenge due to high taxes.

words.laoTranslation: ເປັນໄພຄຸກຄາມ
words.thaiTranslation: เป็นภัยคุกคาม
words.definition: To create a dangerous situation or risk.
words.exampleSentence: Cyber attacks pose a threat to national security.

words.laoTranslation: ຈື່ຈໍາໄວ້, ຄໍານຶงໄວ້
words.thaiTranslation: จำใส่ใจไว้, คำนึงถึง
words.definition: Remember or consider information while making plans or decisions.
words.exampleSentence: Bear in mind that the office will close early today.

words.laoTranslation: ລົດຕິດຫຼາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: การจราจรติดขัด/หนาแน่น
words.definition: A large volume of vehicles on the road causing slow movement.
words.exampleSentence: I was late for work due to heavy traffic.

words.laoTranslation: ໄຮ້ສາລະຢ່າງສິ້ນເຊີງ
words.thaiTranslation: ไร้สาระอย่างสิ้นเชิง
words.definition: Completely absurd or laughable.
words.exampleSentence: The idea that cats can fly is utterly ridiculous.

words.laoTranslation: ໜາວຈັດ, ໜາວສຸດໆ
words.thaiTranslation: หนาวจัด, หนาวเหน็บ
words.definition: Extremely cold in an unpleasant way.
words.exampleSentence: The winter wind made it a bitterly cold morning.

words.laoTranslation: ຕັ້ງໜ້າຕັ້ງຕາຄອຍຖ້າ
words.thaiTranslation: ตั้งหน้าตั้งตารอ
words.definition: Await something with excitement or pleasure.
words.exampleSentence: I look forward to meeting you next week.

words.laoTranslation: ເລື່ອນເວລາອອກໄປ
words.thaiTranslation: เลื่อนออกไป, ผลัดวันประกันพรุ่ง
words.definition: Postpone an event or activity.
words.exampleSentence: Don't put off until tomorrow what you can do today.

words.laoTranslation: ໝົດ, ບໍ່ເຫຼືອ
words.thaiTranslation: หมด, ไม่มีเหลือ
words.definition: Use up the supply of something.
words.exampleSentence: We ran out of milk, so I need to go to the shop.

words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ເກີດຂຶ້ນ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้เกิดขึ้น, ก่อให้เกิด
words.definition: Cause something to happen.
words.exampleSentence: The new technology brought about major changes in the workplace.

words.laoTranslation: ດູຖູກ, ສົບປະໝາດ
words.thaiTranslation: ดูถูก, เหยียดหยาม
words.definition: Think that someone or something is inferior.
words.exampleSentence: You shouldn't look down on people just because they are poor.

words.laoTranslation: ກຳກວມ
words.thaiTranslation: กำกวม
words.definition: Open to more than one interpretation; having a double meaning.
words.exampleSentence: His reply to my question was somewhat ambiguous.

words.laoTranslation: ຢືດຢຸ່ນ, ທົນທານ
words.thaiTranslation: ยืดหยุ่น, ทนทาน
words.definition: Able to withstand or recover quickly from difficult conditions.
words.exampleSentence: She is a resilient girl who quickly recovered from the illness.

words.laoTranslation: ເຮັດໃຫ້ຮ້າຍແຮງຂຶ້ນ
words.thaiTranslation: ทำให้แย่ลง
words.definition: Make a problem, bad situation, or negative feeling worse.
words.exampleSentence: Running will only exacerbate your knee injury.

words.laoTranslation: ປະຕິບັດຕົວຈິງ, ເປັນຈິງ
words.thaiTranslation: ในทางปฏิบัติ, เน้นผลจริง
words.definition: Dealing with things sensibly and realistically in a way that is based on practical considerations.
words.exampleSentence: We need a pragmatic approach to management.

words.laoTranslation: ພິຖີພິຖັນ, ລະອຽດລະອໍ
words.thaiTranslation: พิถีพิถัน, ละเอียดถี่ถ้วน
words.definition: Showing great attention to detail; very careful and precise.
words.exampleSentence: He was meticulous about keeping his desk clean.

words.laoTranslation: ອຸດົມສົມບູນ, ມາກມາຍ
words.thaiTranslation: อุดมสมบูรณ์, มากมาย
words.definition: Existing or available in large quantities; overflowing.
words.exampleSentence: The region is famous for its abundant natural resources.

words.laoTranslation: ເມດຕາກະລຸນາ
words.thaiTranslation: เมตตากรุณา, ใจบุญ
words.definition: Well meaning and kindly.
words.exampleSentence: A benevolent gentleman donated money to the orphanage.

words.laoTranslation: ກວດກາຢ່າງລະອຽດ
words.thaiTranslation: ตรวจสอบอย่างละเอียด
words.definition: Examine or inspect closely and thoroughly.
words.exampleSentence: Customers were warned to scrutinize the small print.

words.laoTranslation: ຫຼ້າສະໄໝ, ເລີກໃຊ້
words.thaiTranslation: ล้าสมัย, เลิกใช้แล้ว
words.definition: No longer produced or used; out of date.
words.exampleSentence: New technologies render old computers obsolete.

words.laoTranslation: ສະໜັບສະໜູນ
words.thaiTranslation: สนับสนุน, เป็นกระบอกเสียง
words.definition: Publicly recommend or support.
words.exampleSentence: They advocate for human rights worldwide.

words.laoTranslation: ຜິວເຜີນ
words.thaiTranslation: ผิวเผิน, ไม่ลึกซึ้ง
words.definition: Existing or occurring at or on the surface; lacking depth.
words.exampleSentence: The book only provides a superficial analysis of the issue.

words.laoTranslation: ຮັບຮູ້, ຕຣະໜັກຮູ້
words.thaiTranslation: ตระหนักรู้, รับรู้
words.definition: Having knowledge or being aware of.
words.exampleSentence: Statesmen must be cognizant of the political situation.

words.laoTranslation: ຂະຫຍັນໝັ່ນພຽນ
words.thaiTranslation: ขยันหมั่นเพียร
words.definition: Showing care and conscientiousness in one's work or duties.
words.exampleSentence: A diligent student will always excel in class.

words.laoTranslation: ເປັ່ງອອກມາ, ຫຼັ່ງໄຫຼ
words.thaiTranslation: แผ่ออกมา, ส่งกลิ่น/แสง
words.definition: Issue or spread out from (a source).
words.exampleSentence: Warmth began to emanate from the fireplace.

words.laoTranslation: ບໍ່ມີສາລະ, ຫຼິ້ນໆ
words.thaiTranslation: ไร้สาระ, ไม่สำคัญ
words.definition: Not having any serious purpose or value.
words.exampleSentence: Sorry, I shouldn't waste your time with frivolous complaints.

words.laoTranslation: ຫຼີກເວັ້ນບໍ່ໄດ້
words.thaiTranslation: หลีกเลี่ยงไม่ได้
words.definition: Certain to happen; unavoidable.
words.exampleSentence: Change is an inevitable part of life.

words.laoTranslation: ທີ່ເຮັດກຳໄລໄດ້ດີ
words.thaiTranslation: ที่ทำกำไรงดงาม
words.definition: Producing a great deal of profit.
words.exampleSentence: She turned her hobby into a lucrative business.

words.laoTranslation: ແປກໃໝ່
words.thaiTranslation: แปลกใหม่
words.definition: New or unusual in an interesting way.
words.exampleSentence: The architect presented a novel design for the building.

words.laoTranslation: ເປັນໄປໄດ້, ສົມເຫດສົມຜົນ
words.thaiTranslation: สมเหตุสมผล, เป็นไปได้
words.definition: Seeming reasonable or probable.
words.exampleSentence: The story sounded plausible, so we believed her.

words.laoTranslation: ເຫຼືອເຟືອ, ບໍ່ຈຳເປັນ
words.thaiTranslation: ซ้ำซ้อน, เกินความจำเป็น
words.definition: Not or no longer needed or useful; superfluous.
words.exampleSentence: The programmer removed the redundant lines of code.

words.definition: The occurrence of events by chance in a happy or beneficial way
words.exampleSentence: Finding this restaurant was pure serendipity.

words.definition: Lasting for a very short time
words.exampleSentence: Fashions are ephemeral; trends come and go overnight.

words.definition: Present, appearing, or found everywhere
words.exampleSentence: Smartphones have become ubiquitous in modern society.

words.definition: The capacity to recover quickly from difficulties; toughness
words.exampleSentence: Her resilience in the face of adversity was inspiring.

words.definition: Fluent or persuasive in speaking or writing
words.exampleSentence: She gave an eloquent speech that moved the audience.

words.definition: Dealing with things sensibly and realistically
words.exampleSentence: We need a pragmatic approach to solve this problem.

words.definition: Open to more than one interpretation; having a double meaning
words.exampleSentence: The contract was ambiguous about payment terms.

words.definition: Truthful and straightforward; frank
words.exampleSentence: She was candid about her reasons for leaving.

words.definition: Having or showing care and conscientiousness in work or duties
words.exampleSentence: He was a diligent student who always completed his assignments.

words.definition: The quality of being thankful; readiness to show appreciation
words.exampleSentence: She expressed her gratitude for all the help she received.

words.laoTranslation: ຄວາມຄິດຮອດ
words.thaiTranslation: ความคิดถึง
words.definition: A sentimental longing for the past
words.exampleSentence: Looking at old photos filled her with nostalgia.

words.laoTranslation: ລະອຽດລະອຽດ
words.thaiTranslation: พิถีพิถัน
words.definition: Showing great attention to detail; very careful and precise
words.exampleSentence: The research was conducted with meticulous care.
